name: esp32c3_suite
notes: 10-test hardware suite for ESP32-C3 single native-USB devkit. No external instrument. No PCNT — ESP32-C3 has no PCNT peripheral. 4 jumpers: GPIO4↔GPIO5 (INTR), GPIO6↔GPIO7 (UART1), GPIO2→GPIO1 (ADC1_CH1), GPIO10↔GPIO3 (SPI MOSI↔MISO, CLK=GPIO21, CS=GPIO20). No I2C — C3 has one I2C controller, insufficient free GPIO for loopback. Console via USB Serial/JTAG CDC (/dev/ttyACM0). No reset_strategy needed — native USB does not trigger download mode on port open (no CH341 auto-reset circuit).

required.label: Wire 1 — PCNT pulse out + GPIO interrupt in
Wire 2 — UART1 TX → UART1 RX loopback
